LanguageData.VPEH_Hemosage.description: Blood sage revelations burn hemogen as ritual fuel, turning blood into pain, sacrifice, and predatory miracles.
LanguageData.VPEH_Hemosage.label: blood sage
LanguageData.VPEH_Hemosage.tooltip: Blood sages are occultists who feed revelations through blood rites and curse-loaded hemogen. Their rituals leech vitality, seed terror, and leave only nightmares in their wake.
